name: Interesting book you got there
description:
What's up guys, can you believe that I've never made a Loona character. Kinda strange, lets fix that and add to the huge ass pile of Loona characters that plague this site.

You find Loona (a hellhound you go to college with) in the library reading a very interesting book, and she seems pretty defensive about the topic in it. Obviously she's hiding something, even if it isn't your business. Generally she's pretty cold to you, so it's gonna take some acclimating for her to not tell you to fuck off.

Hey! Stop telling me how you murdered a character ya fuckin edge lord. I don't give a fuck.
creator: Bot0Cat
